name: Paige Field House
hours: Mon–Fri 5:00 AM–10:00 PM · Sat–Sun 7:00 AM–8:00 PM
description: The largest fitness facility on base, featuring strength training, cardio equipment, group exercise studios, pools, and basketball courts.

name: 21 Area Fitness Center
hours: Mon–Fri 5:30 AM–9:00 PM · Sat–Sun 8:00 AM–6:00 PM
description: Full-service fitness center serving the 21 Area community with strength and cardio equipment.

name: 41 Area Fitness Center
hours: Mon–Fri 5:30 AM–9:00 PM · Sat 8:00 AM–5:00 PM
description: Fitness center serving the 41 Area with modern equipment and group fitness classes.

name: 52 Area Fitness Center
hours: Mon–Fri 5:30 AM–9:00 PM · Sat 8:00 AM–5:00 PM
description: Serves the 52 Area community with comprehensive fitness facilities.

name: MCAS Fitness Center
hours: Mon–Fri 5:00 AM–9:00 PM · Sat–Sun 7:00 AM–7:00 PM
description: Aviation community fitness facility with state-of-the-art equipment.

name: CDC-1 Mainside
description: Largest Child Development Center on base. Full-day and part-day care for children ages 6 weeks to 5 years. Currently at capacity — waitlist open.

name: CDC-2 Las Pulgas
address: Las Pulgas Area, Camp Pendleton, CA 92055
description: Child Development Center serving the Las Pulgas community. Ages 6 weeks to 5 years. Currently at capacity — waitlist open.

name: CDC-3 San Onofre
address: San Onofre Area, Camp Pendleton, CA 92055
description: Child Development Center serving the San Onofre community. Ages 6 weeks to 5 years. Limited availability — shorter wait than other CDCs.

name: Iron Mike's Restaurant
hours: Mon–Fri 11:00 AM–9:00 PM · Sat–Sun 10:00 AM–9:00 PM
description: Main full-service restaurant at Camp Pendleton. American cuisine, burgers, steaks, and family-friendly atmosphere.

name: Pub 1795
hours: Mon–Fri 3:00 PM–11:00 PM · Sat–Sun 12:00 PM–11:00 PM
description: Sports bar and pub with craft beers, TVs, billiards, and live entertainment on weekends.

name: Windmill Canyon Restaurant
description: Casual dining serving the 41 Area community. American and Mexican cuisine.

name: MCCS Theater (BLDG 1330)
description: On-base movie theater showing recent releases every Saturday. Affordable pricing for all eligible patrons.

name: Pacific Views Event Center
description: Premier event venue for large gatherings, ceremonies, and entertainment events on base.

name: Marine Memorial Golf Course
address: Golf Course Rd, Camp Pendleton, CA 92055
description: 18-hole championship golf course with driving range, putting green, pro shop, and restaurant. One of the finest military golf courses in California.

name: Leatherneck Lanes
hours: Tue–Fri 12:00 PM–10:00 PM · Sat–Sun 10:00 AM–10:00 PM
description: 12-lane bowling center with arcade, snack bar, and cosmic bowling nights on weekends.

name: Del Mar Beach & Marina
address: Del Mar Beach, Camp Pendleton, CA 92055
description: Beautiful Pacific beach with marina, beach cottages, boat rentals, volleyball courts, fire pits, and picnic areas. Cottage reservations recommended.

name: San Onofre Beach
description: World-famous surfing beach. Vehicle access, camping, and some of the best surf breaks on the West Coast.

name: Lake O'Neill Recreation Area
description: Freshwater lake with fishing, kayaking, paddleboats, camping, and picnic facilities. Annual fishing derby and family events.

name: Stepp Stables
address: Stepp Stables Rd, Camp Pendleton, CA 92055
description: Equestrian facility offering trail rides, riding lessons, horse boarding, and special events.

name: 13 Area Pool
hours: Mon–Fri 5:30 AM–8:00 PM · Sat–Sun 10:00 AM–6:00 PM
description: Olympic-size competition pool with lap swimming, recreational swim, swim lessons, and aqua aerobics.

name: 21 Area Pool
hours: Mon–Fri 5:30 AM–8:00 PM · Sat–Sun 10:00 AM–5:00 PM
description: Community pool serving 21 Area with lap swimming and recreational facilities.

name: Auto Skills Center
description: DIY auto repair facility with lifts, tools, and expert advice. Oil changes, tire rotations, brakes, and more.

name: ITT Mainside (BLDG 15102)
description: Information, Tickets & Travel office offering discount theme park tickets, show tickets, vacation packages, and travel planning.

name: ITT / Latitudes Travel — Pacific Plaza
description: Full-service ITT and Latitudes Travel office. Discount tickets, vacation packages, cruise bookings, and MCRD graduation travel.

name: Marine Corps Exchange — Main Store
hours: Mon–Sat 9:00 AM–8:00 PM · Sun 10:00 AM–6:00 PM
description: Full-service department store offering clothing, electronics, household goods, and more at tax-free military prices.
